/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/varn.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o bin/varn  lib/libvarn_core.a lib/libvarn_vendor_lua.a lib/libpugixml.a lib/libvarn_ffi_vendor.a lib/libvarn_vendor_libffi.a lib/libPocoNetSSL.a lib/libPocoCrypto.a _deps/openssl-source-build/libssl.a _deps/openssl-source-build/libcrypto.a lib/libPocoUtil.a lib/libPocoNet.a lib/libPocoFoundation.a
